name: Hard Rock Cafe Baked Potato Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the bacon and reserve it.
2. Cook the onions in the remaining drippings over medium-high heat until transparent, about 3 minutes.
3. Add flour, stirring to prevent lumps; cook for 3-5 minutes until the mixture just begins to turn golden.
4. Gradually add chicken stock, whisking to prevent lumps until the liquid thickens.
5. Reduce the heat to simmer and add potatoes, cream, crumbled bacon, parsley, garlic, red pepper sauce, salt, and black pepper. Simmer for 10 minutes; do not allow to boil.
6. Add grated cheese and green onions, stirring until the cheese melts smoothly.
7. Garnish each serving as desired with chopped bacon, grated cheese, and chopped parsley.
Makes 2 quarts. Serves: 8
